meaning: vt.装满,注满,充满,填充,弥漫,供应,供给,满足vi.充满n.满足,饱,充分,填方v.填充
examples: Dentists fill teeth and repair broken ones.
The company has been unable to fill the post.
Teachers will be asked to fill in a questionnaire.
U.N. officials privately acknowledge this is a big number that may be hard to fill.
They actually have to fill potholes and trim trees and make sure the garbage is taken away.
